# Learning Engineering Resource Hub

> 569 curated entries of evidence-based K-12 and higher education resources.
> Optimized for LLM consumption — fetch the full index in one request.

## Full index (fetch this)
- [llms-full.txt](https://jchoi92k.github.io/Learning-Engineering-Resource-Hub/llms-full.txt): All 569 entries with YAML metadata and descriptions

## What's in it
Reports, papers, datasets, frameworks, code, and platforms from:
- What Works Clearinghouse (practice guides + intervention reports)
- AIMS Collaboratory, Tools Competition 2025, LEVI Math
- Journal of Educational Data Mining, Journal of Learning Analytics
- Learning Policy Institute, Education Trust, Campbell Collaboration
- IES Regional Education Labs, Digital Promise, Brookings
- NCES, IEA, CMU DataShop, OECD, ASSISTments datasets
- Education AI benchmarks (TutorBench, MathTutorBench, FAB-AI)
- Code/reference implementations (pyBKT, pyKT, OATutor, ADL xAPI)

## How to use
Fetch llms-full.txt and query it. Each entry has a title, URL, type, source, tags, and a description written from actual page content.

## Schema
- [schema.md](https://jchoi92k.github.io/Learning-Engineering-Resource-Hub/schema.md): Field definitions, type taxonomy, tag vocabulary
